lines.speaker: a
lines.text: They say the old waystation lights up at night again. Lanterns nobody carries.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: Don't say it three times, {a}. You know what they say about saying it three times.

lines.speaker: a
lines.text: My cousin swears a White Cape was asking after the miller's boy.

lines.speaker: b
lines.text: Then the miller's boy should take a long trip. A very long one.
